title: Premium Access
seoTitle: Game Of Darts Premium Access | BarkinMad Studios
description: Discover the premium upgrades available in Game Of Darts, including Pro, DartBot, and the 48-Hour Pass.
summary: Unlock additional features with the Pro upgrade, DartBot, or a 48-Hour Pass to get even more from Game Of Darts.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for Game Of Darts Premium Access

sections.heading: Unlock More with Premium Access
paragraphs: Game Of Darts offers flexible premium upgrades designed to suit the way you play. Whether you're looking for permanent access to premium features, want to challenge yourself against DartBot, or simply want to try everything with a 48-Hour Pass, there's an option to suit every player.
Premium upgrades enhance the experience by unlocking additional features, reducing interruptions, and giving you access to even more of what Game Of Darts has to offer.

sections.heading: Choose Your Upgrade
paragraphs: Select the premium option that best matches how you play.
bullets: Pro Version – Permanently unlock premium features.
DartBot – Unlock the AI practice opponent and sharpen your skills.
48-Hour Pass – Enjoy temporary access to premium features for 48 hours.

sections.heading: Why Upgrade?
paragraphs: Premium access is designed to make every session more enjoyable while unlocking additional tools and features for regular players.
bullets: Reduce or remove advertisements, depending on your purchase.
Support the continued development of Game Of Darts.

sections.heading: Supporting Future Development
paragraphs: Every premium purchase directly supports the continued development of Game Of Darts. It helps fund new game modes, additional features, improvements, bug fixes, and future updates.
Even if you choose to play for free, using the app and watching optional rewarded advertisements helps support future development.

images.caption: Unlock additional features with Premium Access.
